features: This 250ml Air Freshener Refill by Airess is perfect for eliminating unwanted odours
With its fresh smell- leaving more pleasant smelling air!

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS - Enjoy A Fresh And Aromatic Feeling As Elegant Automatic Refill Spray Keeps Your Room Fresh Day And Night. Our Long-Lasting Fragrance Will Enhance The Atmosphere At Homes, Offices And Indoor Spaces Everywhere. We Are Sure You Will Love Our Products As Much As We Do! A Gift For All Occasions.

LONG LASTING & PREMIUM QUALITY - Our Long-Lasting Fragrance Will Enhance The Atmosphere As A Bathroom Air Freshener Spray And A Room Odor Eliminator Spray. The Fragrances Are Mixed In-House By Our Artisans To Provide A Touch Of Class And Quality. Breathe Fresh Air With Scented Automatic Sprays At Home, Offices Or In Indoor Spaces! Elegant Automatic Refill Sprays Are Unique In The Market Due To Their Long-Lasting Fragrance And Fresh Aroma That Will Refresh Your Senses And Make You Feel At Home Away From Home
